title: cirsium incanum
intro: Cirsium incanum, also known as the Gray Thistle or Woolly Thistle, is a species of thistle native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural antiseptic due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and saponins. The health benefits of Cirsium incanum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Cirsium incanum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
